Texts.AppName: AI image screening and review workbench
Texts.Auth:AccessTokenRevoked: Login credentials have been invalidated(revoked), please login again.
Texts.Auth:AccountLocked: Account has been locked out due to invalid login attempts, please try again later or contact administrator.
Texts.Auth:AccountDisabled: Account has been disabled, please contact administrator.
Texts.Auth:AccountNotAllowed: This account is not allowed to login.
Texts.Auth:RefreshTokenExpired: Login has expired, please login again.
Texts.Auth:RefreshTokenRedeemed: The specified refresh token has already been redeemed.
Texts.Auth:RefreshTokenInvalid: Refresh token is invalid, please login again.
Texts.Auth:BadRequest: The request itself contains errors or has an invalid format.
Texts.Auth:NotFound: The requested resource does not exist.
Texts.Auth:MethodNotAllowed: The requested method is not allowed.
Texts.Auth:TooManyRequests: The request is made too frequently. Please try again later.
Texts.Auth:ServerError: Server internal error, please try again later.
Texts.Auth:UnexpectedError: The request encountered an unexpected error.
Texts.Auth:TwoFactorInvalid: Invalid verification code, please try again.
Texts.Auth:ClientConfigError: Client configuration error, please contact administrator.
Texts.Auth:ClientUnauthorized: Client is not authorized to use this authentication method.
Texts.Auth:AuthenticationFailed: Authentication failed, please try again later.
